name: iweb
description: Abdulkerims persönliche Website – modern, responsive, DSGVO-konform

scripts.build: echo '✅ Static site – no build step needed'
scripts.check-links-local: lsof -i :8000 | grep LISTEN > /dev/null && npm run check-links || (node scripts/dev-server.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 5; npm run check-links; kill $SERVER_PID)
scripts.purge: mkdir -p css/purged && purgecss --css css/*.css --content pages/**/*.html js/**/*.js --output css/purged/
scripts.optimize: npm run compress-images && npm run purge
scripts.pre-deploy: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run validate-html && npm run validate-css && npm run optimize
scripts.test: npm run validate-html && npm run validate-css
scripts.minify-css: cleancss -o css/_global.min.css css/_global.css && cleancss -o css/index.min.css css/index.css && cleancss -o css/menu.min.css css/menu.css
scripts.minify-js: terser js/main-init.js -o js/main-init.min.js && terser js/menu.js -o js/menu.min.js

author: Abdulkerim
